summary: Implementation plan is ready for GitHub issue #8. Build a dependency-free Flow helper/example mirroring the Surface helper pattern, add exports and a Flow status read helper, prove local Kontour round trips with validators, and document helper-only semantics in README.
next_steps: Update src/console-foundation/index.js with getFlowProcessStatus() and helper exports.
Create test/flow-process-helper.test.js covering projection/status and gate event local round trips.
Update README.md to mark the Flow helper as example-only with no real Flow integration or run-control execution.
Run npm test, npm run inspect:fixtures, the forbidden API scan, and git diff --check.
warnings: Do not add network, process execution, URL fetch/open, or action execution behavior.
Do not couple the read helper to selected Surface claims, Campfit review items, or live Flow runtime state.
If README text matches the forbidden API regex, rephrase the documentation rather than weakening the verification command.
